items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic candidate-to-request integrity.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of deterministic candidate-to-request integrity, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data that would confirm or deny this requirement. The prior steps do not address the necessary elements to validate this requirement, indicating a gap in the evidence provided. As a result, the validation is inconclusive due to the lack of concrete information regarding the integrity of candidate-to-request relationships.
